title: Verify rate limiting locks account after 5 failed login attempts
description: Test that the system locks out further login attempts after 5 failed attempts within the rate limit window
preconditions: User account exists with known incorrect password

steps.description: 2. Enter valid email and incorrect password
4. Repeat steps 2-3 four more times (total 5 failed attempts)

expected_result: After 5th failed attempt, account is locked for 15 minutes with appropriate message
